text:
A Growing International Presence
223 Countries – A Leader in All Military Markets in the U.S. and Abroad
Since its launch in 2013, USNI News has become the go-to daily source for what’s happening in the U.S. Navy, Marine Corps, Coast Guard and in the defense industry that serves them. It’s meteoric growth has been fueled by our dedication to providing the best editorial content in the industry and by a the ever-growing number of Sea Services, Pentagon and Capitol Hill decision makers who read and depend on that content every day. If it’s important, it’s on USNI News.
Congress, the Pentagon and domestic international news agencies regularly cite our reporting as a trusted source for timely, accurate and unbiased information on naval and national security matters. Our stories are picked up daily by the U.S. Navy’s CHINFO Clips, Defense News’ Early Bird and a who’s who of national media outlets with a reach of a million page views a month.
Our top ten domestic cities each month usually include Washington DC (always ranked first), New York, San Diego, Norfolk, Los Angeles, Virginia Beach, Arlington and Houston so you know the right people are reading USNI News—from senior decision makers in the U.S. Congress, and the Defense Department to flag and general officers in the U.S. Navy, Marine Corps and Coast Guard.
USNI News also has superb international reach. More than 25 percent of our monthly readership is international. Often London and Sydney even break into our top ten list. USNI News also has large readership demographics in Canada, the United Kingdom, Australia, Germany, Japan, Singapore and in some of the fastest growing defense markets in the world like Vietnam, India and China.
You can’t afford not to be on USNI News.
For more information on advertising or sponsorship opportunities with USNI News, contact our Advertising Sales Representative: Karen Tappenden, (o) 717-430-2401 | (c) 267-629-9494 | karen.tappenden@theygsgroup.com.
